title: Media Browser
description: Youtube, YT Music, Spotify, Apple Music browser in Minecraft.
body:
Media browser in Minecraft

It has:

Youtube,Youtube Music,Spotify,Apple Music.

B is default key for opening browser.

Select the media you want at start.

 

Video/Music is plays in background

K is default key for play/pause. 

J is default key for previous video/music.

L is default key for forward video/music. 

 

O is default key for closing background browser.

You can change the keys from controls section.

 

You can add Pop-up video.

Adjust size of Pop-up with mouse wheel or +,- button or drag it.
